description_long: This lamp features a circular, flat base with a notch and a cylindrical central column that supports a large, bulbous glass enclosure. The base appears to be made of metal or painted material, with a smooth, matte finish and a subtle groove detail around its edge. The central column is solid and robust, with a rectangular cutout or access panel visible from one side. The glass enclosure is clear and houses a visible filament or tube, suggesting a traditional bulb design. The overall form is minimalistic and functional, with no ornate or decorative embellishments. The lamp is designed for stability and practicality, suitable for urban or industrial environments.
description: A minimalistic lamp with a round, flat base, a cylindrical column, and a large clear bulb enclosure. The design is functional and industrial, with a smooth matte finish and a visible bulb.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical column centered on a round base with a notch at the front and the clear bulb enclosure above.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a rectangular cutout or access panel on the column and the same round base with a notch offset to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cylindrical column and the round base with a notch at the rear, no visible cutout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the column and base, showing the notch on the right and no visible cutout.
